steps.title: Substitute and solve for x
steps.content:
The first equation $y = 4x + 1$ is already solved for $y$. Substitute this into the second equation:
$$4(4x + 1) = 15x - 8$$
Expand:
$$16x + 4 = 15x - 8$$
Subtract $15x$ and subtract 4 from both sides:
$$x = -12$$

steps.title: Find y and calculate x - y
steps.content:
Substitute $x = -12$ into the first equation:
$$y = 4(-12) + 1 = -47$$
Therefore:
$$x - y = (-12) - (-47) = 35$$
